title: pyrrosia bicolor
intro: Pyrrosia bicolor is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the two-colored pyrrosia or two-colored polypody. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrrosia bicolor include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of Pyrrosia bicolor can be made into tea or infusions, and it can also be used in traditional remedies, such as poultices and salves.
